searchQuery.title: Search by active substance or brand name
searchQuery.description: Optional. Filter results by active substance (principio attivo) or brand name (denominazione). Case-insensitive, partial match. Examples: 'paracetamolo', 'ibuprofene', 'metformina', 'tachipirina'. Leave empty to get the full database.

atcCode.title: Filter by ATC code
atcCode.description: Optional. Filter by ATC code prefix. Examples: 'N02' (analgesics), 'A10' (diabetes), 'C10' (cholesterol), 'J01' (antibiotics). Leave empty for all.

classeSSN.title: Filter by NHS reimbursement class
classeSSN.description: Optional. Filter by AIFA reimbursement class. 'A' = fully reimbursed by NHS, 'H' = hospital only, 'C' = not reimbursed (patient pays full price). Leave empty for all classes.

onlyWithPriceGap.title: Only medicines with price gap
onlyWithPriceGap.description: When enabled, only returns medicines where the retail price is higher than the NHS reference price — i.e. the patient must pay the difference. Useful for identifying savings opportunities.

maxItems.title: Maximum results
maxItems.description: Maximum number of medicines to return. Set to 0 for the full database (typically 10,000–15,000 records).

includeHistoric.title: Include previous month's data
includeHistoric.description: When enabled, also downloads the previous month's list and adds a 'previousPriceEur' and 'priceChange' field showing month-over-month price changes.
